  • Changelog

    Module: cumulative_incidence

    module-immuno-cumulative-incidence.Rmd

    Purpose

    cumulative_incidence produces covariate-adjusted cumulative incidence curves and vaccine efficacy (VE) estimates over time. All analyses use the CFsurvival package, which implements nonparametric covariate-adjusted survival estimation.

    The module is structured as three independent trial-specific sub-modules, each in its own subdirectory:

    Sub-module Trial Structure
    vat08_bivalent/ Sanofi Stage 2 bivalent Script-based (make)
    vaxart_mock/ BARDA VaxArt mock Self-contained Rmd
    covail/ COVAIL prototype vs. OC Self-contained Rmd

    Sub-module: vat08_bivalent

    Purpose

    Produces cumulative incidence plots and instantaneous and cumulative VE estimates for the Sanofi Stage 2 bivalent CoP analysis.

    Source: correlates_reporting2/cumulative_incidence/vat08_bivalent/
    Scripts: cumincplot.R, instantaneousVE.R, cumulativeVE.R

    Run via utilrep2 

    library(utilrep2)

report_root <- "/path/to/correlates_reporting2"
setup_session(
  trial       = "vat08_combined",
  platform    = "linux",
  data_path   = file.path(report_root, "data_clean"),
  report_root = report_root
)
    run_cumulative_incidence()

    This executes in order:

    1. cumincplot.R — cumulative incidence curves by arm
    2. instantaneousVE.R — instantaneous VE estimates over time
    3. cumulativeVE.R — cumulative VE estimates with confidence bands

    Output is written to cumulative_incidence/vat08_bivalent/output/.

    Sub-module: vaxart_mock

    Purpose

    Covariate-adjusted cumulative incidence curves for the BARDA VaxArt mock dataset, comparing the investigational and comparator vaccine arms across two time windows (7 to 180 days and 7 to 350 days post-D31).

    Source: correlates_reporting2/cumulative_incidence/vaxart_mock/
    Key report: vaxart_mock_cumulative_incidence_report.Rmd

    Run directly

    This sub-module is a self-contained Rmd notebook; render it from within its directory:

    .check_pkg <- function(pkg) stopifnot(requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE))
.check_pkg("rmarkdown")

module_dir <- file.path(
  "/path/to/correlates_reporting2",
  "cumulative_incidence", "vaxart_mock"
)
old <- setwd(module_dir); on.exit(setwd(old))

rmarkdown::render(
  "vaxart_mock_cumulative_incidence_report.Rmd",
  output_file = paste0("vaxart_mock_cumulative_incidence_report_",
                       format(Sys.Date(), "%Y%m%d"), ".pdf")
)

    The Rmd reads the analysis dataset via config::get(config = "nextgen_mock"), restricts to Phase-1 per-protocol participants (ph1.D31_7 == 1), and produces covariate-adjusted cumulative incidence curves using CFsurvival::CFsurvival() with adjustment for HighRiskInd and demo.stratum.

    Sub-module: covail

    Purpose

    Cumulative incidence and VE report comparing the COVAIL Prototype cohort against Omicron-Containing vaccine cohorts for manuscript-level output.

    Source: correlates_reporting2/cumulative_incidence/covail/
    Key report: cumulative_incidence_report_Prototype_vs_OC_manuscript.Rmd

    Run directly 

    module_dir <- file.path(
  "/path/to/correlates_reporting2",
  "cumulative_incidence", "covail"
)
old <- setwd(module_dir); on.exit(setwd(old))

rmarkdown::render(
  "cumulative_incidence_report_Prototype_vs_OC_manuscript.Rmd",
  output_file = paste0("covail_cumulative_incidence_",
                       format(Sys.Date(), "%Y%m%d"), ".pdf")
)

    Key package: CFsurvival

    All three sub-modules depend on CFsurvival for nonparametric covariate-adjusted survival estimation. It is sourced from GitHub:

    # Install if needed
remotes::install_github("tedwestling/CFsurvival")

    The core call pattern used in both Rmd sub-modules is:

    library(CFsurvival)

fit <- CFsurvival(
  time        = dt$time_to_event,
  event       = dt$event_indicator,
  treat       = dt$Trt,
  confounders = dt[, c("HighRiskInd", "demo.stratum")],
  fit.times   = seq(0, t0, by = 1),
  fit.treat   = c(0, 1)
)

    Output summary

    Sub-module Output location Key outputs
    vat08_bivalent vat08_bivalent/output/ Cumulative incidence plots, instantaneous VE, cumulative VE
    vaxart_mock vaxart_mock/ Date-stamped PDF report
    covail covail/ Date-stamped PDF report

    Supported trials

    Trial Sub-module Function
    vat08_combined vat08_bivalent/ run_cumulative_incidence()
    nextgen_mock vaxart_mock/ render Rmd directly
    COVAIL covail/ render Rmd directly

    Developed by Y H.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
